schema_version.description: Schema version of the artifact; bumped on breaking ABI changes.

updated_at.description: When the thread was last updated.

root.description: Absolute path of the project root.

base_ref.description: Git ref the thread works against.

repo.description: Project the thread is anchored to; null for a no-project Ask thread.

mode.description: Default mode for new turns; individual turns may override.

auth_preference.description: Preferred auth route: subscription (native/OAuth session), api_key (a stored API key), or auto (engine picks subscription-first with policy fallback). A preference, not a secret.

primary_harness.description: Sticky primary harness for the thread (re-routable); an ordering bias, not a privileged role.

eligible_harnesses.description: Sticky eligible harness pool for the thread (races run one candidate per pool member); empty = the engine auto-pools doctor-ok harnesses.

mode.description: Per-thread workspace mode: in_place mutates the live project tree directly (the default); isolated keeps a persistent git worktree per thread that apply merges into the project.

worktree_path.description: Persistent worktree path; set lazily on the first write turn of an isolated thread.

base_sha.description: Snapshot SHA the isolated worktree (or last apply) is based on.

workspace.description: How the thread's turns touch files (in-place live tree vs isolated worktree).

run_ids.description: Ordered run lineage (each run is a turn move).

head_run_id.description: Most recent run of the thread; null before the first turn runs.

state.description: Thread lifecycle state: active or explicitly closed (archived). Blocked is a live projection, not a thread state.

Thread.description: The Claudexor-owned conversation about a project; runs are turns inside it. SSOT for lineage; vendor sessions are caches.
